commonAddYourReferenceForThisExport: Add your reference for this export

catchCertificateAddYourReferenceHint: This reference is for your own records and won't appear on the final certificate. For example, you might use an internal tracking number, project code, or any label that makes sense for your organisation.
commonAddYourReferenceHint: Enter a reference to help you identify this {{journeyText}} within the service. This reference is for your own use and will not appear on the final certificate. For example, you could choose a reference number from your organisation.

commonAddExporterDetailsWarningContent: This information will appear on the final catch certificate.
commonAddExporterDetailsWarningContentLi: Add the name and address of the company (or individual) responsible for this export.
This information will appear on the final {{journeyText}} so please make sure the exporter details are correct before continuing.
commonAddExporterDetailsStorageNotesWarn: This information will appear on the non-manipulation document.
commonAddExporterDetailsExporterCompanyN: If you do not have a company name, enter the full name of the person responsible for the export.
ccAddExporterDetailsExporterNameOfPerson: This should be a company name or the person overseeing the export process.
commonErrorPageTitle: Sorry, there is a problem with the service
commonErrorPagesaveText: Everything you have done so far has been saved.
commonAddExporterDetailsExporterAddressR: Your registration address could not be accessed. Please add the exporter’s address

commonWhatExportersAddressNotFoundText: I can not find the address in the list
commonWhatExportersAddressSubBuildingNam: For example, the flat or apartment number
commonWhatExportDestinationHintSelectThe: This is the main destination country for the export, not the countries it is passing through. This information will not appear on the final document.

ccAddCatchDetailsSpeciesDetailsBestResul: For best results, search for the common English name or the FAO code (if known) as species nicknames are not supported.
ccAddCatchDetailsSpeciesDetailsCannotFin: If you cannot find the species and it is not exempt, call
commonSummaryPageNotificationBannerMessa: Due to improvements in the way addresses are managed, the exporter’s address in this document has been reloaded from your Defra account. Please check the address is correct and change if necessary
commonAddTripDetailsWarningContent: From 10 January 2026 the start date, catch area and gear type fields will be mandatory under new EU regulations.
getHelpBody: If you have a {{documentName}} unique reference number, have it with you when you call.
getHelpHours: Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm (except public holidays)
getHelpMovingFish: exporting or moving fish from the UK
commonRefreshPageForUpdates: Refresh the page to check for updates to your catch certificates. Open failed submissions to find out how to fix the problem.
commonRefreshPageForUpdatesProcessingSta: Refresh the page to check for updates to your processing statements. Open failed submissions to find out how to fix the problem.
commonRefreshPageForUpdatesStorageNotes: Refresh the page to check for updates to your non-manipulation documents. Open failed submissions to find out how to fix the problem.
euIntegrationSuccessfulTitle: Your data has been transferred to EU CATCH
euIntegrationSuccessfulDescription: Your catch certificate data was successfully transferred to the EU CATCH system.
euIntegrationPendingTitle: Sending your data for EU integration
euIntegrationPendingDescriptioncatchCert:
Your catch certificate data is being sent to the EU CATCH system.

This can take a few minutes.
euIntegrationPendingDescriptionstorageNo:
Your non-manipulation document data is being sent to the EU CATCH system.

This can take a few minutes.
euIntegrationPendingDescriptionprocessin:
Your processing statement data is being sent to the EU CATCH system.

This can take a few minutes.
euIntegrationPendingViewDashboardcatchCe: Your catch certificate is still valid and ready to use.
euIntegrationPendingViewDashboardstorage: Your non-manipulation document is still valid and ready to use.
euIntegrationPendingViewDashboardprocess: Your processing statement is still valid and ready to use.
euIntegrationFailedTitle: There is a problem with EU data integration
euIntegrationFailedDescriptioncatchCerti: Your catch certificate was created, but the data could not be sent to the EU CATCH system automatically.
euIntegrationFailedDescriptionstorageNot: Your non-manipulation document was created, but the data could not be sent to the EU CATCH system automatically.
euIntegrationFailedDescriptionprocessing: Your processing statement was created, but the data could not be sent to the EU CATCH system automatically.
euIntegrationFailedMeansText1catchCertif: The EU importer will need to enter the catch certificate data manually into the CATCH system.
euIntegrationFailedMeansText1storageNote: The EU importer will need to enter the non-manipulation document data manually into the CATCH system.
euIntegrationFailedMeansText1processingS: The EU importer will need to enter the processing statement data manually into the CATCH system.
euIntegrationFailedMeansText2StartcatchC: Your catch certificate is still valid and ready to use.
euIntegrationFailedMeansText2Startstorag: Your non-manipulation document is still valid and ready to use.
euIntegrationFailedMeansText2Startproces: Your processing statement is still valid and ready to use.
euIntegrationFailedMeansText2Link: You can view or download it from your dashboard.
euIntegrationIfYouNeedToSpeak: If you need to speak to someone
euIntegrationContactHelpline: Contact the helpline if you're exporting soon and need more information.
